backlog.title: Measure the Free Page visit-to-lead conversion rate
backlog.hypothesis: A visible baseline will expose the highest-leverage funnel bottleneck.

backlog.title: Research recurring buyer language for one narrow service niche
backlog.hypothesis: Using the buyer’s own pain language will improve qualified replies.

backlog.title: Test one proof-focused Free Page message
backlog.hypothesis: Concrete proof will convert more qualified visitors than broad claims.

decision.reason: Establish a real funnel baseline before automatically changing copy or outreach.
